title: Beatable Peacefull Mode
description: This datapack adds a chance to blaze rod drops as a barter from a piglin, making peacefull mode beatable.
body:
This datapack adds a chance to get a blaze rod barter trade from a piglin.

The chance to get the trade is 20%.

You may get anywhere from 1 to 4 blaze rods, so the game is still viable.
